title: Guidance: RTFO and SAF Mandate feedstock materials used for creating low carbon fuels

sections.heading: Summary
sections.content:
The Department for Transport (DfT) has announced new guidance concerning the feedstock materials permitted for producing low carbon fuels as part of the Renewable Transport Fuel Obligation (RTFO) scheme. This guidance includes a detailed list of acceptable feedstock materials for creating renewable fuels within the RTFO framework and the Sustainable Aviation Fuel (SAF) mandate.

The emphasis on low carbon fuels is critical for sustainability in aviation, an industry with deep-rooted connections to Scottish heritage. The development of sustainable aviation fuel is essential for minimizing carbon emissions, supporting the continued evolution of aviation, and enhancing connectivity through airports operated by HIAL across the Highlands and Islands.
